{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133626DEA3560360B2A832F00A"}"},"total":16},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7361404781758251800","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以重点人物为主线，内容充实，语言通俗易懂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713963330,"group_id":"7221805679470709812","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzNyqfUL7g4nLGdXDHbO+zQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"109011192004","user_name":"用户10901119"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109011192004","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221805679470709812","book_info":{"abstract":"一本书为你道尽清朝年间众生相。
清朝，一个统治中国近三百年的王朝，给我们留下了太多的惊讶和太多的沉重。近些年来，以清朝为背景戏说的电视剧大行其道，说明这段离我们近的古代历史仍然能够引起人们的兴趣。在一般人的印象里，清朝被贴上的是腐败、屈辱的标签。其实，这只是晚清时期一个写照——所有王朝的没落时期概莫能外，大清王朝真实的历史要丰富得多，也生动得多。在中国历史上，有五胡乱中华的时代，有蒙古铁骑主中原的时代，但时问都不长，像元朝就不足一百年。而崛起于边地的满洲人，却能牢固地掌控中原三百年，这足以证明了它的不同寻常。
我们讲清朝那些事，就不能不讲清朝的那些皇帝，自努尔哈赤以后，皇太极、康熙、雍正、乾隆个个雄才大略；说完帝王，就不能不提后妃和公主，她们以自己特有的方式，在历史上留下了自己的身影；讲清朝那些事儿，还得说说那些王爷们，这些至尊至贵的王爷们大多命运多舛；讲清朝那些事儿，必须讲一讲权相能臣的命运，权相也好，能臣也罢，除了兢兢业业地干好自己的活儿，剩下的只能看他与皇帝的缘份了；讲清朝那些事儿，还要说贪官廉吏们的悲喜结局，三百年的清王朝中出了数不清的贪官，也出过一些廉吏；讲清朝那些事，我们不能回避给当下的清官戏提供了不少素材的一个个谜团和异事。
清王朝曾经创造了一个又一个的政治、军事奇迹，同时，在这个少数满洲人统治着大多数汉人的特殊朝代，也发生了许多奇异的事，出现了许多奇异的人，这些人和事在今天看来有的很有趣，有的很可笑，有的很无奈，还有的则成了永远不可能解的谜团。其实，任何奇人奇事都有其出现、发生的社会背景和现实基础，揭奇的表象，探究其背后的秘密，才是更有意义的事情。清朝那些事儿，有辉煌，有凄惨，有温情，有血腥，有文治武功，有丧权辱国，有板上钉钉的铁案，也有难求答案的谜雾。清朝那些事儿，让我们起敬，让我们心痛，让我们回味。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东篱子","author_id":"","book_id":"7221805679470709812","book_name":"清朝那些事儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8b888","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"15.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221808020345326604","read_count":"1217","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"124783"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"11","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255386&x-signature=u36HGXMKvy4EhZHWI8o0cXP3%2BK4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"29"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133626DEA3560360B2A832F00A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19462,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5938},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7386638512556163902","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，分析鞭辟入里，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719839196,"group_id":"7221805679470709812","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3mlBEg8TdtXtRhRcOgSdWA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3725033360","user_name":"台州新明半岛的尹桃拉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3725033360","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221805679470709812","book_info":{"abstract":"一本书为你道尽清朝年间众生相。
清朝，一个统治中国近三百年的王朝，给我们留下了太多的惊讶和太多的沉重。近些年来，以清朝为背景戏说的电视剧大行其道，说明这段离我们近的古代历史仍然能够引起人们的兴趣。在一般人的印象里，清朝被贴上的是腐败、屈辱的标签。其实，这只是晚清时期一个写照——所有王朝的没落时期概莫能外，大清王朝真实的历史要丰富得多，也生动得多。在中国历史上，有五胡乱中华的时代，有蒙古铁骑主中原的时代，但时问都不长，像元朝就不足一百年。而崛起于边地的满洲人，却能牢固地掌控中原三百年，这足以证明了它的不同寻常。
我们讲清朝那些事，就不能不讲清朝的那些皇帝，自努尔哈赤以后，皇太极、康熙、雍正、乾隆个个雄才大略；说完帝王，就不能不提后妃和公主，她们以自己特有的方式，在历史上留下了自己的身影；讲清朝那些事儿，还得说说那些王爷们，这些至尊至贵的王爷们大多命运多舛；讲清朝那些事儿，必须讲一讲权相能臣的命运，权相也好，能臣也罢，除了兢兢业业地干好自己的活儿，剩下的只能看他与皇帝的缘份了；讲清朝那些事儿，还要说贪官廉吏们的悲喜结局，三百年的清王朝中出了数不清的贪官，也出过一些廉吏；讲清朝那些事，我们不能回避给当下的清官戏提供了不少素材的一个个谜团和异事。
清王朝曾经创造了一个又一个的政治、军事奇迹，同时，在这个少数满洲人统治着大多数汉人的特殊朝代，也发生了许多奇异的事，出现了许多奇异的人，这些人和事在今天看来有的很有趣，有的很可笑，有的很无奈，还有的则成了永远不可能解的谜团。其实，任何奇人奇事都有其出现、发生的社会背景和现实基础，揭奇的表象，探究其背后的秘密，才是更有意义的事情。清朝那些事儿，有辉煌，有凄惨，有温情，有血腥，有文治武功，有丧权辱国，有板上钉钉的铁案，也有难求答案的谜雾。清朝那些事儿，让我们起敬，让我们心痛，让我们回味。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东篱子","author_id":"","book_id":"7221805679470709812","book_name":"清朝那些事儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8b888","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"15.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221808020345326604","read_count":"1217","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"124783"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"11","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255386&x-signature=u36HGXMKvy4EhZHWI8o0cXP3%2BK4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"37"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133626DEA3560360B2A832F00A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23270,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28468,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4334},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7380517933313131326","common":{"comment_typ 我们讲清朝那些事，就不能不讲清朝的那些皇帝，自努尔哈赤以后，皇太极、康熙、雍正、乾隆个个雄才大略；说完帝王，就不能不提后妃和公主，她们以自己特有的方式，在历史上留下了自己的身影；讲清朝那些事儿，还得说说那些王爷们，这些至尊至贵的王爷们大多命运多舛；讲清朝那些事儿，必须讲一讲权相能臣的命运，权相也好，能臣也罢，除了兢兢业业地干好自己的活儿，剩下的只能看他与皇帝的缘份了；讲清朝那些事儿，还要说贪官廉吏们的悲喜结局，三百年的清王朝中出了数不清的贪官，也出过一些廉吏；讲清朝那些事，我们不能回避给当下的清官戏提供了不少素材的一个个谜团和异事。
清王朝曾经创造了一个又一个的政治、军事奇迹，同时，在这个少数满洲人统治着大多数汉人的特殊朝代，也发生了许多奇异的事，出现了许多奇异的人，这些人和事在今天看来有的很有趣，有的很可笑，有的很无奈，还有的则成了永远不可能解的谜团。其实，任何奇人奇事都有其出现、发生的社会背景和现实基础，揭奇的表象，探究其背后的秘密，才是更有意义的事情。清朝那些事儿，有辉煌，有凄惨，有温情，有血腥，有文治武功，有丧权辱国，有板上钉钉的铁案，也有难求答案的谜雾。清朝那些事儿，让我们起敬，让我们心痛，让我们回味。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东篱子","author_id":"","book_id":"7221805679470709812","book_name":"清朝那些事儿","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8b888","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"15.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221808020345326604","read_count":"1217","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"124783"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"11","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b3301ae71a2fae0595f0c6824b997ec0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255386&x-signature=u36HGXMKvy4EhZHWI8o0cXP3%2BK4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133626DEA3560360B2A832F00A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读34分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2050,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2050,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":4555},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","
